# 5 篇代表作

1. Y. Zhu, M. Tang, Z. Ma.
   **DeepRTE: Pre-trained attention-based neural network for radiative transfer**.
   *Computer Methods in Applied Mechanics and Engineering*, 449, 118556, 2026.
   [[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cma.2025.118556) [[PDF]](dist/papers/deeprte.pdf)

2. J. Chen, Z. Ma, K. Wu.
   **A micro-macro decomposition-based asymptotic-preserving random feature method for multiscale radiative transfer equations**.
   *Journal of Computational Physics*, 537, 114103, 2025.
   [[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcp.2025.114103) [[PDF]](dist/papers/aprfm.pdf)

3. K. Wu, X.-B. Yan, S. Jin, Z. Ma.
   **Capturing the diffusive behavior of the multiscale linear transport equations by Asymptotic-Preserving Convolutional DeepONets**.
   *Computer Methods in Applied Mechanics and Engineering*, 418, 116531, 2024.
   [[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cma.2023.116531) [[PDF]](dist/papers/apcons.pdf)

4. J. Han, C. Ma, Z. Ma, W. E.
   **Uniformly accurate machine learning-based hydrodynamic models for kinetic equations**.
   *Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences (PNAS)*, 116(44), 21983–21991, 2019.
   [[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.1909854116) [[PDF]](dist/papers/ml_kinetic.pdf)

5. J. Hu, Z. Ma.
   **A Fast Spectral Method for the Inelastic Boltzmann Collision Operator and Application to Heated Granular Gases**.
   *Journal of Computational Physics*, 385, 119–134, 2019.
   [[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcp.2019.01.049) [[PDF]](dist/papers/fsm.pdf)
